LOCAL WLUC-TV6 METEOROLOGIST RELAYED A REPORT OF A POWER OUTAGE AT COPPER HARBOR THIS EVENING. THE LAST REPORT WAS A MEASURED 42 MPH WIND GUST FROM THE NNE AT 1936 EST IN COPPER HARBOR. REPORT VIA NWS CHAT.
